### Got questions?

- ### What is the Experience plan 5-Year price guarantee?











New and existing accounts on an Experience postpaid voice plan can rest assured that the price of talk, text and data won’t change for at least 5 years as long as you are on an Experience plan. The guarantee also applies to price for data on wearable/tablet/mobile internet lines added to your plan. Your guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn’t restart if you add a line or change plans after that. Taxes & fees, per-use charges, plan add-ons, third-party services (e.g. streaming services, international data and satellite services) and network management practices aren’t included.

- ### Is satellite service included with my Experience Beyond plan?











Yes, T-Satellite is included on us with Experience Beyond and Go5G Next plans. Customers on other plans can add the service for a limited time at $10/month (a savings of $5/mo.), per line. Learn more at [https://www.t-mobile.com/coverage/satellite-phone-service](https://www.t-mobile.com/coverage/satellite-phone-service).

- ### How does the Experience plan 5-Year price guarantee work?











Your guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and we won’t change the price of talk, text and 5G smartphone data on our network for at least five years, as long as you are on an Experience plan. Adding or changing to a different Experience plan doesn’t restart the 5-year period.

- ### What does it mean for my plan to have Unlimited Premium Data on the Best Mobile Network?











Most unlimited plans give you an amount of data at the start of your bill cycle where you are prioritized higher than customers who are heavy data users. This data is called Premium Data. Once you have used that data, you are prioritized lower than other customers and you may notice lower speeds in times and places with network congestion. All of our new Experience plans include unlimited premium data, including Experience Beyond and Experience More with 55+/First Responder and Military Savings plans. T-Mobile has been awarded the Best Mobile Network in the U.S based on analysis by Ookla of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025.

- ### What do “upgrade ready,” “yearly upgrade,” mean?











Our Experience plans have benefits that give you the freedom to upgrade when you want. Upgrade as early as every year with Experience Beyond or be upgrade-ready every two years with Experience More. This is unlike AT&T and Verizon, who quietly increased device contracts from two years to three—with no shorter option if you want their best phone deal.

- ### How does the yearly upgrade benefit work on Experience Beyond?











With Experience Beyond, you’ll automatically become eligible for a yearly upgrade.



1. Purchase a new phone with any eligible promotion on T-Mobile’s no-interest phone payment plan (EIP) via 24 monthly bill credits plus tax and keep it active on an Experience Beyond plan for at least six months.

2. Once half of your phone is paid off, you can trade in your device in good working condition. Then T-Mobile will cover the remaining half of your device cost so you're ready to upgrade.

3. Your yearly upgrade benefit allows you to take advantage of any eligible in-market phone promotions. You’re guaranteed the same great phone deals as a new T-Mobile Experience Beyond customer.



      For example, if you purchase a $1,000 smartphone with Experience Beyond, you can trade it in toward a new one once you pay half ($500) and it's past 6 months. T-Mobile covers the remaining $500 on the old phone. New T-Mobile customers and existing customers on Experience Beyond always get the same great deals when they’re ready to upgrade.

**Experience More**

With Experience More, you will automatically become eligible for an upgrade every two years by taking advantage of any eligible in-market phone promotions.

1. Purchase a new phone with any eligible promotion on T-Mobile’s no-interest phone payment plan (EIP) via 24 monthly bill credits plus tax and keep it active on an Experience More plan.

2. After two years, you're ready to upgrade and can take advantage of any eligible in-market phone promotions. New T-Mobile customers and existing customers on Experience More always get the same great phone deals when they’re ready to upgrade.

- ### What does “new and existing customers get the same phone offers” mean?











Existing customers on qualifying plans always get the same great device deals as new customers switching to T-Mobile on those plans. This is a promise, not a limited-time offer. So whether you’re just joining T-Mobile or have been with us for years, you’ll have access to the same great phone deals now and in the future when you’re ready to upgrade. It’s the fair treatment you can count on from T-Mobile.

- ### Which phone plans come with 5G and Ultra Capacity 5G (5G UC) network access?











All our phone plans include unlimited talk, text, and data on our 5G network and ultra-fast speeds with Ultra Capacity 5G. Check out our 5G [coverage map](https://www.t-mobile.com/coverage/coverage-map)  to see if 5G is available in your area.

- ### What is Netflix on Us, Apple TV just $3/month, and Hulu on Us?











  - **Netflix ON US** Netflix Standard with ads is included at no additional cost on the following plans: Experience Beyond, Experience More™, including Experience Beyond or More with 55+/First Responder/Military Savings. Get more details at [www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming/netflix-on-us](https://www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming/netflix-on-us)

  - **Apple TV just $3/month** Experience Beyond, Experience More™, including Experience Beyond or More with 55+/First Responder/Military Savings get Apple TV included at no additional cost as a plan benefit (up to $9.99 per month value). Get more details at [www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming/apple-tv-plus-deal](https://www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming/apple-tv-plus-deal)

  - **Hulu (with Ads) ON US** Customers on Experience Beyond plans will be eligible for Hulu (With Ads) on us. Get more details at [www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming/hulu-on-us-deal](https://www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming/hulu-on-us-deal)

- ### What do I need to know about 3rd Line Free or Discounted 3rd Line?











To qualify for a free or discounted voice line, you must:



  - Activate a new account with at least three voice lines on an eligible rate plan:
    - 3rd Line Free: Essentials™, Experience More or Experience Beyond.
  - The bill credit will be applied monthly to the eligible line.

  - Your new lines must remain active to continue receiving bill credits.

  - A maximum of one free or discounted voice line may be added per account for this promotion.

- ### How long will 3rd Line Free promotional pricing last?











You can keep the promotional pricing as long as you maintain an eligible rate plan with a minimum of three active lines.

- ### Can I combine 3rd Line Free promotion with Family Freedom, Keep and Switch, or other promotions?











Yes, you may combine this offer with most other promotions, including device promotions, [Family Freedom](https://www.t-mobile.com/switch/pay-off-carrier-etf-phone-deal), and [Keep and Switch](https://www.t-mobile.com/switch/keep-phone-switch-from-verizon-or-att). Talk to us to ensure you meet the requirements for both promotions. This promotion cannot be combined with other free or discounted voice line offers, and 55+, Military & Veteran, and First Responder discounted plans.

- ### Can I get the 3rd Line Free promotion on 55+, Military, or First Responder plans?











No, this promotion is only available with qualifying regular-rate voice plans.

- ### Does my free or discounted line need to be a voice line?











Yes, your free line must be a voice line. Other line types are not eligible for this promotion.

- ### How many free lines can I get with the 3rd Line Free/Discounted promotion?











This offer has a maximum of **one** free or discounted voice line per account.

- ### Am I required to use AutoPay to qualify for 3rd Line Free/Discounted?











You’re never required to use [AutoPay](https://www.t-mobile.com/support/account/autopay), but you’ll get a monthly discount on select voice plans if you sign up for AutoPay with an eligible payment method. AutoPay is not required to receive the promotion.

- ### What’s the most affordable cell phone plan T-Mobile offers?











T-Mobile offers a range of affordable cell phone plans built to fit different customer needs. Try [comparing our plans](https://www.t-mobile.com/commerce/plan-details) to find the best value for you as they’ll vary depending on factors like the number of lines, discounts you may be eligible for, and built-in value like streaming services and device upgrades.Also, being a T-Mobile customer means getting access to Magenta Status from day one—which, on top of value-packed plans and industry-leading benefits, gives customers access to one-of-a-kind perks and wireless powered by [America’s Best Mobile Network](https://www.t-mobile.com/coverage/network) as supported by Ookla® Speedtest®.

- ### Does T-Mobile offer phone plans for one person?











Yes! All of our plans offer single-line options with great benefits tailored to how you want to live and stay connected. Try [comparing our plans](https://www.t-mobile.com/commerce/plan-details) to find the best fit.

- ### What are the best family mobile plans available at T-Mobile?











T-Mobile offers a variety of family mobile plans packed with value—including unlimited data, exclusive perks with streaming, entertainment, travel, and more. The more lines you add, the more you save, making it simple and affordable for your whole family to stay connected. Explore and [compare our family plans](https://www.t-mobile.com/commerce/plan-details) to find the one that best suits your needs.

- ### What cell phone plan deals can I get at T-Mobile?











T-Mobile offers a variety of deals for both new and existing customers. Check out our [latest deals](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers) to find out how you can save today.

web.title: T‑Mobile Introduces Its Most Value-Packed Plan Ever
web.description: It starts at just $140 a month for three lines with AutoPay, meaning families get the best benefits in wireless for just $46 per line, plus ...
web.markdown:
![](https://www.t-mobile.com/news/_admin/uploads/2026/01/nr-hero-1-2-26-v2-500x250.png)[Arrow Right Icon](https://www.t-mobile.com/news/_admin/uploads/2026/01/nr-hero-1-2-26-v2.png)

7 min read

- Facebook IconShare on Facebook
- Share on Twitter
- LinkedIn IconShare on LinkedIn

**BELLEVUE, Wash. — Jan. 7, 2026 —** The Un-carrier is flipping the wireless equation once again. As families head into the new year looking for smarter ways to save, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) today unveiled Better Value, a brand-new family plan that gives new and long-term customers, including small businesses, the best of T-Mobile’s benefits — like streaming on Us, unlimited data abroad and satellite connectivity — at a special new year price.

Available Jan. 14, Better Value delivers everything families expect from a premium wireless plan: America’s Best Network, top-tier benefits and built-in extras without the premium price tag. It starts at just $140 a month for three lines with AutoPay, meaning families get the best benefits in wireless for just $46 per line, plus taxes and fees, making it the Un-carrier’s best value family plan.

Better Value is designed to deliver real savings families can feel right away and keep over time. Families can save over $1,000 compared to similar plans from AT&T and Verizon, by getting built-in benefits the other guys leave out, like streaming and satellite connectivity, while existing T-Mobile customers upgrading their family plan with three or more lines from Essentials can save over $50 a month on included benefits like entertainment, satellite and premium scam protection. And unlike short-term deals that quietly disappear, these savings are built to last — because wireless is a long-term commitment, especially for families. That’s why Better Value comes with a five-year price guarantee on talk, text and data, so families can count on the price they sign up for — not just this year, but for years to come.

“Families are looking for ways to save and get more value from the services they rely on every day, especially wireless,” said Mike Katz, Chief Business and Product Officer at T-Mobile. “While AT&T and Verizon keep asking people to pay more for less, we’re doing the opposite. We’re going beyond one-time phone deals and giving families over $1,000 in savings not just this year — but in the years to come — compared to AT&T and Verizon, with our best, most benefit-packed plan that’s backed by a five-year price guarantee and the reliability of America’s Best Network.”

**Better Value Plan**

The new, limited-time plan is purpose-built for families who want a premium wireless experience without the premium price. It’s available for new customers with three or more phone lines — switching at least two of those lines to T-Mobile — and existing customers with three or more lines that have been with the Un-carrier for five or more years, including those with at least one line that add new lines. Better Value includes:

- **Unlimited premium data** on T-Mobile’s 5G network
- **Unlimited hotspot data** with 250GB of high-speed data every month, 600 kbps after
- **Unlimited North America data** with 30GB of high-speed data in Mexico and Canada every month, 256 kbps after
- **Unlimited data abroad** with 30GB of high-speed data abroad, 256 kbps after in over 215 countries and destinations
- **Satellite connectivity included** with unlimited text and data via satellite-optimized apps
- **Best Entertainment Bundle in Wireless** with Netflix and Hulu on Us and Apple TV for just $3/month
- **Five-year price guarantee** on Talk, Text and Data
- **Home Internet Backup for just $10** with AutoPay, plus taxes and fees, to keep the household connected when the primary internet service provider goes down
- **Two-year device upgrades** with the same great deals as new customers joining eligible plans to pick up the latest [smartphones](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers)
- **Great deals NOW on new devices** for those switching, including the latest [smartphones on Us](https://www.t-mobile.com/switch/15-minute-switch?gclsrc=aw.ds&&cmpid=MGPO_PG_P_25HD17SMIL_2442011210774_186190317324_786717437922&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=16905366899&gbraid=0AAAAAD79WuVKRjZBNLqrC1OUZEWkDdlcP&gclid=EAIaIQobChMIj9v9h4H1kQMVxR6tBh3HjA6bEAAYAyAAEgJcB_D_BwE) with no trade in required

And only T-Mobile customers get [Magenta Status](https://www.t-mobile.com/benefits), with even more benefits that start from day one and keep adding up. Members get industry-leading value, a world-class experience on top of America’s Best Mobile Network… just for being with the Un-carrier. Members can enjoy exclusive [hotel and rental car perks](https://hub.tmobiletravel.com/?redirecturl=%2fmembership%2f), exclusive ticket access and premium experiences at [thousands of concerts and festivals nationwide](https://www.t-mobile.com/benefits/music-deals), free [DashPass by DoorDash](https://www.t-mobile.com/benefits/doordash?icid=MGPO_TMO_U_PPFREDASH_044ACAB59C7E147A43565), weekly perks through [T-Mobile Tuesdays](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers/t-mobile-tuesdays) and more.

To see how Better Value stacks up against the other wireless providers, check out: [t-mobile.com/resources/how-to-join-us](https://www.t-mobile.com/resources/how-to-join-us).

**Switch in just 15 Minutes per line — all on the T-Life app**

Saving money shouldn’t come with a headache. With T-Mobile’s new 15 Minutes to Better experience in the T-Life app, families can switch faster than ever. All within the app, customers can use [Easy Switch](https://www.t-mobile.com/switch/get-started) (beta) to help find the right plan for them, then either keep their devices (and save the upgrade for later) or get same-day phone delivery powered by DoorDash. And for anyone worried about devices they may still be paying off, T-Mobile will help cover the cost of switching by [paying off](https://www.t-mobile.com/support/new-to-tmobile/keep-and-switch) eligible device balances up to $800 per line, for up to four lines.

It’s wireless switching designed for people, not carriers. Check out more here: [t-mobile.com/news/un-carrier/switchingmadeeasy](https://www.t-mobile.com/news/un-carrier/switchingmadeeasy).

For more information on Better Value, visit [www.t-mobile.com/offers/family-plan-deal](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers/family-plan-deal) or [www.t-mobile.com.](https://www.t-mobile.com/)

Already a T-Mobile customer? Head to the [T-Life app](https://www.t-mobile.com/apps) for more information — it’s a one-stop shop for all things T-Mobile where customers can upgrade their device, manage their account and benefits plus connect with Care.

Follow the T-Mobile Newsroom on [X](https://x.com/tmobilenews) and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/tmobilenews/) to catch the latest company updates.

\# # #

Limited time subject to change. **5-Year Price Guarantee: Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.** Guarantees monthly price of on-network talk, text, & 5G data for accounts activating on an eligible plan. **See exclusions & details at T-Mobile.com.** **Better Value plan:** Requires 3+ new lines & 2 eligible ports (for switchers) or 3+ lines & 5+ years tenure on T-Mobile postpaid plan. Canceling lines or changing plans will impact price & promos. Not combinable with some offers, discounts, or promotions. Available in T-Life & T-Mobile.com. **Savings:** Requires 3+ lines of Better Value plan. Savings vs. comparable plans at AT&T and Verizon plus the cost of optional benefits; plan features and taxes & fees vary. **Best Benefits in Wireless:** Based on the value of benefits included with T-Mobile plans, like entertainment, travel perks, and T-Mobile Tuesdays. Benefits vary by plan and may require activation; see plan for details. **15 minutes:** Check out in 15 minutes or less per line. **Backup Internet:** With $10 monthly bill credit. Qualifying Beyond Value line and new or existing Home Internet Backup line required. Home Internet Backup not available in all areas. Credits may take up to 2 bill cycles; **credits will stop if you cancel any lines or change plans**. Limit 1/account. Based on analysis by Ookla of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission. Visit T-Mobile.com.

**About T-Mobile US, Inc.**

As the supercharged Un-carrier, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) is powered by an award-winning 5G network that connects more people, in more places, than ever before. ![](https://i0.wp.com/tmo.report/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/bettervaluefeatured.png?fit=1280%2C720&ssl=1)

#### Hey there! Looks like you're blocking ads.

We get it, they're annoying, and we won't stop you. However, consider adding us to your allowlist, or [joining our Patreon](https://patreon.com/themobilereport) to support our independent journalism. Tiers start at just $1/mo!

It’s time for yet another new plan from the folks over at T-Mobile.

T-Mobile has announced a brand new family plan called “Better Value”. At first, you might hear the words “new plan” and think “oh great, a price increase”. Well this time, there might actually be some value to be had, especially if you’re switching from a competitor.

There are a number of catches and restrictions, however. We’ve got access to a few internal documents with all the juicy details, so let’s dive right in.

## The Better Value Plan

The new Better Value plan is highly focused on your actual plan price over time than it is other benefits like phone promos. For those that like to save over the long term, this is probably the plan to pick.

Pricing starts at $140 per month for 3 lines. Additional lines (up to 8) are an extra $30 per month, and more than that (up to 12 lines) are an additional $40 per month.

Better Value lines up pretty well with T-Mobile’s current “Experience Beyond” plan. In fact, for the most part, the actual plan benefits are the same or better than Beyond, all while keeping a price that more aligns with the cost of the Experience More plan.

[![](https://i0.wp.com/tmo.report/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/bettervaluecompare_wm.jpg?resize=640%2C360&ssl=1)](https://i0.wp.com/tmo.report/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/bettervaluecompare_wm.jpg?ssl=1)

One improvement with Better Value is that the new plan includes 30GB of Simple Global data. That’s double what you get on Beyond. Also, adding a Backup Home Internet line, which offers 130GB of data per month via one of T-Mobile’s home internet gateways, for just $10 per month. That’s half of what everyone else pays.

The only thing Better Value doesn’t have is **yearly upgrade**. That perk is excluded from the new plan (remember, they’re focusing on plan price here).

The plan also includes the things we’ve come to expect from T-Mobile nowadays, like free Netflix with ads, free Hulu with ads, and $9.99 off Apple TV (so +$3/mo currently).

New customers that sign up for the new plan can also snag iPhone 17 phones for free, no trade required, as long as they port a number in from a competitor on that line.

## Eligibility

The new plan has some weirdness with who’s eligible, however.

The new plan requires a minimum of 3 lines. There is no single-line version of this plan. Both consumers and business plans (up to 12 lines) are eligible.

New customers who are coming from another carrier must port in at least 2 numbers. Those can be from anywhere, though, so that’s not too difficult of a criteria to meet.

As for existing customers, **they must have at least a 5-year tenure on T-Mobile** to be allowed to switch to this new plan. That’s quite a restriction, but it’s likely designed that way so that those on more recent expensive plans have to stick with what they got, while those on older cheaper plans are free to move to one that probably costs a bit more. Win-win for T-Mobile.

## The Catches

Now for what you’ve been wondering: What’s the catch?

Well for those that follow T-Mobile promos, you’ll know that free lines and the insider discount are two of the more popular promos you can get. Unfortunately, those are absolutely not available in any way on Better Value.

New customers that sign up for Better Value cannot use an insider code, and they will never be eligible for free lines that may release in the future. There are also no segmented versions of this plan (like 55+, Military, First Responder), and no Work Perks discounts are available.

Existing customers that want to move to Better Value will lose their insider and free lines, if they have them, and those lines will become paid lines.

The plan also includes a 5-year price guarantee. That means you should expect some increases after that.

Finally, phone promos line up with Experience More values. That means that when a phone promo comes around, expect slightly less value out of your trade-in device than you’d see on Experience Beyond.

## A Limited Time Deal

![](https://i0.wp.com/tmo.report/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image.png?resize=640%2C482&ssl=1)

According to our internal documents, this plan is available only for a limited time, and isn’t a permanent offering. We don’t have any indication how long it’ll be available either.

Overall, our view is this: If you’re thinking of moving to T-Mobile from a competitor, and you only need 3 or 4 lines, this is the perfect time to port over. You basically get the perks of Experience Beyond at an Experience More price.

If you have less than 3 lines or want the option of adding free lines in the future, this might not be the best plan. Also, if you’re able to snag an insider code, Experience Beyond is probably still the way to go.

The new plan will be available starting Wednesday January 14th.
